creator: amdmi3@FreeBSD.org
text:
assimp was recently fixed, but pioneer still doesn't build as it uses x86 assembly:

Profiler.cpp:84:9: error: invalid output constraint '=q' in asm
                                                : "=q" (ret), "=m" (ptr_)
                                                  ^

This is upstream problem. I think we should mark pioneer with ONLY_FOR_ARCHS=i386 amd64 here.
